components.name: exact_product
components.source: active company product names, profile product keywords, and document-extracted tender product names

components.name: normalized_text
components.source: normalized company product/profile terms and tender product/title terms

components.name: cpv
components.source: exact 8-digit CPV or documented prefix hierarchy

components.name: semantic_similarity
components.source: deterministic trigram plus token-set similarity; no embedding is claimed

components.name: technical_specification
components.source: company product descriptions and document-extracted technical requirements

components.name: country
components.source: company target countries and tender country

components.name: certification
components.source: company certificates and document-extracted certification requirements

components.name: quantity_capacity
components.source: reserved for comparable quantity and company-capacity units; current backend has no capacity unit

components.name: packaging_unit
components.source: company product descriptions and document-extracted packaging requirements

components.name: supplier_profile
components.source: company role/OEM/private-label capability and explicit tender wording

components.name: engagement_signal
components.source: saved, contacted, applied, or dismissed opportunity workflow state

score_rule: weighted mean across applicable components only
data_completeness_rule: sum of weights for applicable components
confidence_rule: data completeness multiplied by a deterministic document-evidence factor

document_evidence.available: at least one persisted evidence row references a tender document
document_evidence.missing_evidence_effect: document-derived components are null and confidence is reduced

quantity_rule.insufficient_capacity: bounded proportional score with a floor of 10

tenant_boundary: RLS exposes only the owning company's v2 score rows to authenticated partners
